---
title: "Data science walkthrough 1"
format:
  revealjs:
    toc: false
---

## Purpose

This instructor-led walkthrough connects the first day of the course to the
exercises. We will take a small analysis from raw data to a rendered Quarto
output and point out where the Day 1 modules appear in real work.

## Walkthrough goals

- Read and inspect a course dataset.
- Make one statistical summary or model output.
- Use iteration or a function to remove copied code.
- Render a small Quarto document with results that update from code.

## Discussion prompts

- Which part of the analysis would be easiest to break by hand-editing results?
- Where would a function make the code easier to trust?
- What would you need to add before sending this to a collaborator?
